name: Western Uranium & Vanadium Corp.
description: Western Uranium & Vanadium Corp. is a North American mining company focused on the exploration, development, and production of high-grade uranium and vanadium resources. Founded in 2014, the company operates a portfolio of projects across the western United States, including the Sunday Mine Complex in Colorado. By utilizing innovative technologies like kinetic separation, the company aims to achieve low-cost, efficient production of critical minerals essential for clean energy and industrial applications. Headquartered in Toronto, Canada, Western Uranium & Vanadium is publicly traded on the Canadian Securities Exchange and the OTCQX market.
